packageRules.description: Batch Go module minor + patch bumps into one PR; majors open individually (Renovate default) so breaking changes are reviewed in isolation.
Batch GitHub Actions bumps (pin, tag, and digest) into a single low-risk PR.
Batch Dockerfile base-image digest refreshes so both FROM lines move together; a base-image tag bump (e.g. golang minor) still opens on its own.
